BROODMOTHER-BLIGHTFLY_POWER.description: Applies Weak to a random enemy at the start of your turn. Applies Weak to all enemies when killed.
BROODMOTHER-BLIGHTFLY_POWER.smartDescrip: Applies Weak to a random enemy at the start of your turn. Applies Weak to all enemies when killed.
BROODMOTHER-BLIGHTFLY_POWER.title: Blightfly
BROODMOTHER-WASP_NEST_POWER.smartDescrip: Deals 3 damage to a random enemy at the start of your turn. Deals 6 damage to all enemies when killed.
BROODMOTHER-WASP_NEST_POWER.title: Wasp Nest
